creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
Hi, Boris:

   I will be happy to take over the maintainership of this port.
   I get your Email but failed to send email to you, below is
message from my email server:

  Delivery to the following recipient has been delayed:
    boris@tagnet.ru
Message will be retried for 1 more day(s)
Technical details of temporary failure:
Google tried to deliver your message, but it was rejected by the recipient
domain. We recommend contacting the other email provider for further
information about the cause of this error. The error that the other server
returned was: 451 451-209.85.146.179 is not yet authorized to deliver mail
from



Regards,
wen
